review_date_semantics: review_date is the ISO date last reviewed; next_review_gate is the evidence-based milestone before which it must be reviewed again.
evidence: Explicit B0 operator decisions recorded on 2026-07-20; no live effects asserted.

decisions.title: Pilot boundary
decisions.value: Named private pilot: Pezzos Labs and one authorized customer; no public availability.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Pilot scope, customer count, or public-release proposal

decisions.title: First-class customer surfaces
decisions.value: Unified ChatGPT desktop app (with Codex) and ChatGPT Web; Codex CLI/IDE are technical/operator fallbacks only.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Client capability or delivery-surface change

decisions.title: OAuth environment separation
decisions.value: Separate sandbox and production Pipedrive OAuth apps, callbacks, secrets, and identifiers.
decisions.revisit_trigger: OAuth application, callback, or environment-boundary change

decisions.title: Pipedrive distribution
decisions.value: Private or unlisted for named pilot companies.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Distribution, customer, or public-release proposal

decisions.title: ChatGPT installation
decisions.value: Private to named pilot workspaces/users.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Workspace/user scope or public-installation proposal

decisions.title: Cloudflare account boundary
decisions.value: Existing Pezzos Labs account with strictly separate sandbox/prod Workers, Access apps/audiences, namespaces/bindings, secrets, and hostnames; account-level shared blast radius accepted.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Account, environment-boundary, or blast-radius change

decisions.title: Per-CRM MCP topology
decisions.value: One externally distinct MCP per CRM; production Pipedrive endpoint https://pipedrive-mcp.pezzoslabs.com/mcp. Future crm-mcp.pezzoslabs.com is additive orchestration/discovery only unless rebaselined. Share libraries/ops, never credentials, OAuth clients, registries, policies, keys, or migration state.
decisions.revisit_trigger: New CRM, hostname, shared-state, or orchestration proposal

decisions.title: Private app composition
decisions.value: One full private ChatGPT Pipedrive app with all seven canonical workflows; no thematic bundles.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Workflow catalog or packaging proposal

decisions.title: Claude compatibility
decisions.value: Maintain existing Claude delivery compatibility during V1, with no new Claude surface or acceptance promise; Claude is never reviewer or executor in this program.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Claude retirement, expansion, or review-tool proposal

decisions.title: Future backup
decisions.value: Davy Guittard of Keilintech remains the designated future distinct backup; not informed, not accepted, with no access or validated recovery. Narrow risk acceptance waives only active backup for B7/B8 separate named sandbox work for Pezzos Labs and one existing unpaid informed-testing pilot after a redacted receipt and exact authorities. Stop triggers are customer billing, additional-customer access, real production data or traffic, public availability, and security incident. B9/B10, production, billing, and expansion require all D08 conditions recorded.
decisions.evidence: Explicit operator risk acceptance, 2026-07-21; no live effect asserted.
decisions.next_review_gate: Before first B7/B8 live sandbox action; again before B9/B10, customer billing, or additional-customer access
decisions.revisit_trigger: customer_billing, additional_customer_access, real_production_data_or_traffic, public_availability, security_incident

decisions.title: Support and offboarding ownership
decisions.value: Alexandre temporarily owns support, incident command, and offboarding; concentration risk reviewed before first customer.
decisions.revisit_trigger: First-customer readiness, support ownership, or incident change

decisions.title: Legal and privacy timing
decisions.value: Prepare drafts earlier; final privacy notice, DPA, subprocessor, DSAR, and breach pack are mandatory after B9 and before B10.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Canary completion, first-customer readiness, legal requirement, or data-processing change

decisions.title: Audit destination
decisions.value: Cloudflare Logpush to distinct dedicated R2 buckets for sandbox and production; no shared durable boundary.
decisions.evidence: Explicit sandbox policy decision, 2026-07-21; production decision preserved from 2026-07-20; no live effect asserted.
decisions.next_review_gate: Before B7 live configuration; again before production activation
decisions.revisit_trigger: Audit destination, export, environment separation, or production-account change

decisions.title: Audit retention and access
decisions.value: Sandbox: 30 days, pipeline-only writes, Alexandre-only reads. Production: 90 days, pipeline-only writes, Alexandre-only reads until the D08 designated-not-activated sequence is complete; separate explicit future backup read decision required after D08 completion. Both environments require controlled immutability/versioning, automatic expiry deletion, and documented legal hold.
decisions.evidence: Explicit sandbox retention/access decision, 2026-07-21; production policy retained and reviewed 2026-07-21; no live effect asserted.
decisions.next_review_gate: Before B7 live configuration; again before production activation
decisions.revisit_trigger: Environment, backup operator, retention, legal hold, or audit-access change

decisions.title: Alerting and observability budget
decisions.value: Critical alerts email Alexandre only; no 24/7 promise; single-route risk accepted; security/tenancy alerts freeze rollout until acknowledged; maximum EUR 10 excluding tax/month. A security incident terminates the B7/B8 exception until containment, closure, and fresh explicit authority.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Alert route, acknowledgement process, security-incident closure, or budget approach

decisions.title: Service objective and recovery
decisions.value: Best effort; one-business-day recovery target; 24-hour RPO for configuration/audit; no contractual SLA. Pipedrive is authoritative; lost credential means safe reconnection.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Service commitment, recovery evidence, or customer-contract change

decisions.title: Pilot capacity and cost
decisions.value: Maximum two companies, four named users, 1,000 tool calls/day total, and EUR 25 excluding tax/month infrastructure+observability excluding existing ChatGPT/Pipedrive subscriptions; freeze onboarding at 80%; no automatic plan/quota increase.
decisions.revisit_trigger: 80% threshold, limit, cost, subscription, or onboarding change

decisions.title: Encryption-key rotation
decisions.value: Versioned AES-256-GCM envelopes with kid; primary plus old decrypt-only key; annual planned rotation and immediate compromise rotation; bounded re-encryption; retire old key after zero-use evidence plus 30 days; compromise can force reconnect.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Key compromise, crypto implementation, or rotation evidence

decisions.title: Audit-HMAC rotation
decisions.value: Quarterly epochs with explicit identifier; current emit key plus previous correlation key for at most 90 days; no historical rewrite; immediate new epoch on compromise; bounded admin-only cross-epoch correlation.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Key compromise, audit-correlation implementation, or epoch evidence

decisions.title: Production canary
decisions.value: Alexandre + Pezzos Labs only; read-only dedicated synthetic organization, person, deal, and activity with no email, phone, notes, or real data; seven calendar days and at least five successful active sessions; Writes/Deletes/Mailbox disabled; canonical security/isolation/audit stop conditions. Creation is separately authorized live work. A controlled canary authorization/evidence packet must accept exact opaque record IDs before B9; IDs never appear in public/canonical docs. B8 remains separate.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Canary scope, synthetic corpus, record-ID packet, stop condition, or production readiness change

decisions.title: Legacy singleton retention and purge
decisions.value: Application-unreadable through B9 exit and max 14 days after cutover; purge before B10 only with separate irreversible authorization after no-v2-read-path/binding proof, intended per-user credentials, rollback independence, and redacted audit receipt. Provider grant revoke only if safely identifiable without secret exposure.
decisions.revisit_trigger: Cutover, purge request, rollback change, or provider-grant identification
